headline: Nvidia Stock Heads for Record. What Can Give It Another Boost.
summary: Nvidia  stock was gaining early Monday.  The chip maker was headed for a record close and its earnings could provide more momentum.  While Nvidia is still the leading artificial-intelligence chip company, its 15% stock gain this year so far through Friday’s close has lagged far behind semiconductor peers  Intel  and  Advanced Micro Devices  which have gained on excitement about the uses of their central-processing units for AI inference.

content.title: Nvidia Stock Heads for Record. What Can Give It Another Boost.
content.summary: Nvidia  stock was gaining early Monday.  The chip maker was headed for a record close and its earnings could provide more momentum.  While Nvidia is still the leading artificial-intelligence chip company, its 15% stock gain this year so far through Friday’s close has lagged far behind semiconductor peers  Intel  and  Advanced Micro Devices  which have gained on excitement about the uses of their central-processing units for AI inference.
